title: Updated schema:resource to schema:network to comply with JSON API
body: The libpod JSON API handler for play kube was not decoding the URL query parameters correctly as per the API spec. Changing "reference" to "network" fixed the issue.

@kellen-dunham I don't think you signed your commit which our CI system requires.  Can you please do a `git commit --amend -s`, fetch, rebase and push?
